#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table SAP_HR_Weekly into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import json
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
#import pandas as pd
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import os
import re
from itertools import chain
from collections.abc import Mapping
from operator import add
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.sap_hr_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.sap_hr_weekly"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}/{target_delta_table}"

# Load the source tables
df_source_sap_wwekly = spark.read.format("delta").table(source_delta_table)

print(df_source_sap_wwekly.count())

# Remove rows where 'PersNo' is null
df_source_sap_wwekly = df_source_sap_wwekly.filter(col("PersNo").isNotNull())

print(df_source_sap_wwekly.count())

# Define columns list to be used for RowID hash
rowid_columns = []

#display(df_source_sap_wwekly)

target_sap_hr_weekly_df = df_source_sap_wwekly.select(
    col("PersNo"),
    col("Firstname"),
    col("Lastname"),
    col("EmployeeNo"),
    col("CoCd"),
    col("CompanyCode"),
    col("PA"),
    col("PersonnelArea"),
    col("PSubarea"),
    col("PersonnelSubarea"),
    col("Orgunit"),
    col("OrganizationalUnit"),
    col("Organizationalkey"),
    col("OrganizationalKey1"),
    col("WorkC"),
    col("WorkContract"),
    col("CT"),
    col("ContractType"),
    col("PSgroup"),
    col("PayBandDescription"),
    col("FTE").cast("float"),
    col("Wkhrs").cast("float"),
    col("IndicatorPartTimeEmployee"),
    col("S"),
    col("EmploymentStatus"),
    col("GenderKey"),
    col("TRAStartDate"),
    col("TRAEndDate"),
    col("TRAStatus"),
    col("TRAGrade"),
    col("PrevPersNo"),
    col("ActR"),
    col("ReasonforAction"),
    col("Position"),
    col("Position1"),
    col("CostCtr"),
    col("CostCentre"),
    col("CivilServiceStart"),
    col("DatetoCurrentJob"),
    col("SeniorityDate"),
    col("DatetoSubstGrade"),
    col("PersNo1"),
    col("NameofManagerOM"),
    col("ManagerPosition"),
    col("ManagerPositionText"),
    col("CounterSignManager"),
    col("Loc"),
    col("Location"),
    col("OrgStartDate"),
    col("FixTermEndDate"),
    col("LoanStartDate"),
    col("LoanEndDate"),
    col("EEGrp"),
    col("EmployeeGroup"),
    col("Annualsalary"),
    col("Curr"),
    lit(None).alias("NInumber"), # Avoid adding duplicates
    col("Birthdate"),
    col("Ageofemployee"),
    col("EO"),
    col("Ethnicorigin"),
    col("NID"),
    col("Rel"),
    col("ReligiousDenominationKey"),
    col("SxO"),
    col("WageType"),
    col("EmployeeSubgroup"),
    col("LOAAbsType"),
    col("LOAAbsenceTypeText"),
    col("Schemereference"),
    col("PensionSchemeName"),
    col("DisabilityCode"),
    col("DisabilityText"),
    col("DisabilityCodeDescription"),
    col("PArea"),
    col("PayrollArea"),
    col("AssignmentNumber"),
    col("FTE2").cast("float"),
    # Additional Audit Columns
    lit("SapHr").alias("SourceSystemID"),
    current_timestamp().alias("IngestionDate"),
    current_date().alias("ValidTo"),
    md5(concat(*[col(c).cast("string") for c in rowid_columns])).alias("RowID"),
    lit("Y").alias("IsActive")
